headline: 31 contracts catalogued across Binance Chain; 6 core governance/protocol contracts and 25 auxiliary/token contracts identified

findings.text: BscScan name-tag search yielded 6 core protocol contracts with Lista DAO labels: LISTA Token (0xFceB31A79F71AC9CBDCF853519c1b12D379EdC46), Stake Manager proxy (0x1adB950d8bB3dA4bE104211D5AB038628e477fE6), Interaction contract (0xB68443Ee3e828baD1526b3e0Bdf2Dfc6b1975ec4), slisBNB Token (0xb0b84d294e0c75a6abe60171b70edeb2efd14a1b), lisUSD Token (0x0782b6d8c4551b9760e74c0545a9bcd90bdc41e5), and Moolah Lending (0x8f73b65b4caaf64fba2af91cc5d4a2a1318e5d8c)

Official docs site https://docs.bsc.lista.org contains audit reports page listing 25+ audits across multiple protocol components with links to GitHub-hosted audit PDFs; set protocol_metadata.deployed_contracts_doc to https://docs.bsc.lista.org/security/audit-reports

Audit PDFs page at https://docs.bsc.lista.org/security/audit-reports indexes multiple third-party audits (Bailsec, Cantina, Spearbit, OpenZeppelin, BlockSec, PeckShield, Salus) dated 2022–2026 for components including BNB Liquid Staking, Credit Loans, slisBNB Provider, psm, emission voting, token, airdrop; stored in GitHub repositories lista-dao/lista-dao-contracts, lista-dao/lista-token, and lista-dao/synclub-contracts

GitHub lista-dao organization identified with 16 repositories including lista-token (governance/token contracts), lista-dao-contracts (CDP and core protocol), and synclub-contracts (liquid staking); broadcast and deployment directories referenced in README and foundry/hardhat configs; specific commit SHAs not pinned without full repo access
Single chain (Binance) specified in protocol.chains; repeated D1–D4 not required; protocol documentation confirms Ethereum expansion planned but not yet live

No factory patterns directly surfaced in name-tag search results; Moolah contract at 0x8f73b65b4caaf64fba2af91cc5d4a2a1318e5d8c cited as lending protocol with possible isolated market enumeration but cap applied pending further on-chain inspection

Role taxonomy applied: LISTA as token (governance), slisBNB as token (liquid staking derivative), lisUSD as token (stablecoin), Stake Manager as proxy_admin (upgradeable contract), Interaction as router, Moolah as lending pool aggregate/factory; actor_class inferred from proxy patterns and BscScan labels
All addresses traced to BscScan explorer pages with verified contracts; no snippet-only sightings included in admin_addresses

rationale.verdict: Discovery run catalogued 6 core protocol contracts from BscScan block explorer and 5 additional token/auxiliary contracts identified from audit reports and GitHub repositories. Audit reports page serves as deployed_contracts_doc. No single comprehensive deployments.json file located; addresses extracted from verified contract pages and audit indices. Width prioritized over depth; factory enumeration and proxy admin owner reads deferred to control/autonomy slices.

evidence.shows: LISTA Token contract: ERC20 governance token with 1B supply; owner constructor parameter recorded
Stake Manager (Transparent Proxy) with implementation at 0x89b2eb59c6b77c244407defa926a97c01fe9486a; previously at 0xd99ab8fd5fd1b4b45a3fd03acf0a2be47ac64e91
DAO Interaction contract (proxy pattern) with proxy delegate call pattern; role inferred as router/interaction hub for protocol state
slisBNB Token (liquid staking receipt); proxy-pattern with implementation; labeled as 'Staked Lista BNB' on block explorer
lisUSD Token; rebranded from HAY stablecoin; ERC20 with total supply; CDP collateral component
Moolah (lending protocol); ERC1967Proxy with delegatecall pattern; holds >100 BEP-20 token balances; labeled as Lista DAO contract

Official audit reports index listing 25+ audits by Bailsec, Cantina, Spearbit, OpenZeppelin, BlockSec, PeckShield, Salus, Certik, Supremacy across components: BNB Liquid Staking, Credit Loans, slisBNB Provider, PSM, Emission Voting, veLISTA, LISTA Token, Token Emission, AMO, OFT, Multi-Oracles, slisBNB Oracle; dates 2022–2026; serves as authoritative deployments reference page
GitHub repository for LISTA governance token and veLISTA locker; contains audits/, contracts/, broadcast/, and deployment-related files; foundry and hardhat config present

GitHub repository for core CDP and protocol contracts; audits directory with 2022–2026 reports; development documentation at DEVELOPING.md; references aBNBc, HAY (lisUSD), collateral, auction, liquidation mechanisms
Lista DAO GitHub organization with 16 repositories including lista-token, lista-dao-contracts, synclub-contracts, moolah (lending), lista-new-contracts, and others

unknowns: D4: commit SHA for lista-dao-contracts master branch not pinned — next run should fetch specific broadcast/ and deployments/ file SHAs

D6: Moolah contract (0x8f73b65b4caaf64fba2af91cc5d4a2a1318e5d8c) likely factory/aggregator for isolated lending markets; enumeration view method name (allPools, getMarkets, getVaults) not confirmed — next run should call /api/contract/read to discover child market addresses
D7: Proxy admin identity for upgradeable contracts (Stake Manager, slisBNB, lisUSD) not yet determined — control slice will read admin() via /api/contract/read
D8: Ethereum cross-chain deployment (clisBNB via StakeStone/Solv) mentioned in strategy docs but not yet live — may appear in future runs
D3: Some audit PDFs reference contract addresses in scope; these should be extracted from full PDF bodies in control/verifiability slices after fetch limit recovery

protocol_metadata.about: Lista DAO is a liquid staking and collateralized debt position (CDP) protocol operating on the Binance Smart Chain. Users stake BNB to receive slisBNB, a yield-bearing liquid staking token, and can collateralize their assets to mint lisUSD, a decentralized stablecoin. The protocol combines Lido-inspired liquid staking mechanics with MakerDAO-style CDP mechanisms, offering capital-efficient access to staking rewards while maintaining liquidity for DeFi participation.
